title: Prompt engineering for accurate statistical reasoning with large ...
text: # Prompt engineering for accurate statistical reasoning with large language models in medical research **Objective:** To evaluate the effectiveness of various prompt engineering strategies in guiding LLMs toward accurate and interpretable statistical reasoning in biomedical research. These strategies prompted the models to perform assumption checks, select appropriate statistical tests based on those checks, and provide comprehensive and contextually relevant interpretations. This alignment reinforces the reliability of the LLM-as-a-judge approach in this context and supports its use as a scalable yet accurate evaluation method for prompt engineering in statistical tasks. Keywords: prompt engineering, large language models, statistical reasoning, medical research, AI-assisted data analysis, evaluation frameworks, LLM-as-a-judge, statistical assumption checking Citation: Vilakati S (2025) Prompt engineering for accurate statistical reasoning with large language models in medical research.

title: Mastering Prompt Engineering for AI Innovation | Databricks
text: Prompt engineering is an emerging field at the forefront of artificial intelligence (AI) development that focuses on the critical processes of crafting effective inputs for generative AI (GenAI) models. Prompt engineering plays a crucial role in optimizing the performance of AI models by influencing their behavior and improving the quality of their outputs. 4. Enhancing creativity: Thoughtfully designed prompts can push AI models to generate more creative and diverse outputs, especially in tasks involving content creation or ideation. While effective prompt engineering can significantly enhance AI outputs, poorly designed prompts can lead to various failure modes. By mastering the art and science of prompt engineering, we can unlock the full potential of AI technologies, enabling more accurate, creative and useful AI-generated outputs.

title: Prompt Engineering in AI: A Comprehensive Report | by ByteBridge
text: By addressing challenges such as language ambiguity, potential biases, and the necessity of a user-centric design, prompt engineering significantly improves the accuracy, relevance, and overall efficiency of AI outputs. * Models like GPT and BERT show enhanced performance metrics when guided by prompts that offer explicit clarity, detailed context, and structured examples. The overall result is increased operational efficiency and improved performance metrics across various AI domains, including text summarization, information extraction, question answering, text classification, chatbot conversations, and code generation. In summary, the systematic approach to prompt engineering not only enhances AI interactions with clear and structured prompts but also establishes a robust framework for continuous performance improvement and adaptation to new challenges in the field.

title: Navigating representation: utilizing prompt engineering to minimize ...
text: To achieve this, we have developed three prompting strategies: Baseline Response generates unfiltered captions as a benchmark; Reactive Mitigation employs a feedback mechanism that revises initial captions using examples of harmful content; and Proactive Guidance integrates definitions and examples of harmful content prior to generating captions to guide the model toward more contextually aware outputs. In this article, we investigate how to optimize prompt engineering techniques to minimize representational harms in journalistic image captions, thus ensuring diverse social groups are represented accurately and respectfully. These findings highlight the importance of a hybrid approach, combining automated methods with human oversight to create a robust framework for generating captions that minimize representational harms while accurately representing social groups, particularly in politically and socially sensitive contexts.

title: Using large language models for narrative analysis: a novel ...
text: # Using large language models for narrative analysis: a novel application of generative AI Author links open overlay panel, , , , , , , Researchers must discuss how large language models can assist qualitative analysis. It compared large language model (LLM)-conducted analysis with human analysis of the same qualitative data, explored optimisation of LLMs for narrative analysis and evaluated their benefits and drawbacks. The method was developed iteratively, combining Ipsos' artificial intelligence (AI) expertise and tools with researchers’ qualitative analysis expertise. Claude and GPT-o1 each conducted a narrative analysis of all 138 stories using the same analytic steps as the human researchers. Additionally, this study discusses ethical concerns surrounding responsible AI use in research and proposes a framework for using LLMs in qualitative analysis.

title: How Creative Writers Integrate AI into their Writing Practice
text: Creative writing is a deeply human craft, yet AI systems using large language models (LLMs) offer the automation of significant parts of the writing process. Through interviews and observed writing sessions with 18 creative writers who already use AI regularly in their writing practice, we find that creative writers are intentional about how they incorporate AI, making many deliberate decisions about when and how to engage AI based on their core values, such as authenticity and craftsmanship. * [b [...] or AI support, and values about writing](#core-Bib0023-2) * [c [...] AI-generated content to their vision](#core-Bib0034-3) * [a [...] AI-generated content to their vision](#core-Bib0045-1) AI as an Active Writer: Interaction Strategies with Generated Text in Human-AI Collaborative Fiction Writing 56-65.

title: Google's Viral Prompt Engineering Guide: Master AI in 2025 - LinkedIn
text: One-shot prompting uses a single example to guide AI responses. Iterative design is a crucial approach in crafting effective prompts for AI models. The iterative process helps identify patterns in AI responses and reveals which prompt elements generate the most accurate and relevant outputs. ### Contextual Prompting: Enhancing AI Responses Contextual prompting enhances AI responses by providing relevant background information and specific parameters. The combination of iterative design and contextual prompting creates a framework for developing increasingly effective AI interactions. Example Prompt for Code Generation: "Generate a Python function that [specific task] with the following requirements: The standardization of prompts across different AI applications marks a critical step toward achieving consistent, reliable outputs from language models.
